mapper.select: SELECT chg_hstry_id, emp_plan_id, prev_emp_plan_id, chg_dt, chg_chptr, chg_cn, sig_chg_yn, chg_user_id FROM emp.th_emp_chg_hstry WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} ORDER BY chg_dt DESC, chg_hstry_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.th_emp_chg_hstry (emp_plan_id, prev_emp_plan_id, chg_dt, chg_chptr, chg_cn, sig_chg_yn, chg_user_id) VALUES (#{empPlanId}, #{prevEmpPlanId}, NOW(), #{chgChptr}, #{chgCn}, COALESCE(#{sigChgYn}, 'N'), #{chgUserId})
